creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to freebsd from comment #0)

This is not a packaging oversight as it builds perfectly under poudriere (which is a jailed environment), and runs perfectly here. I've been using spamassassin-devel for the last six to eight months here.

The UPDATING file in the tarball says:

- The HashCash module and support has been removed completely, as it
  has been long since deprecated.

HashCash has been deprecated and entirely removed from spamassassin. Looks like you will need to remove references to HashCash from your configuration.
